questions._comment_type: Multiple Choice — correct_answer is the option letter e.g. A
questions.content: What is the main purpose of the passage?
questions.group_instruction: Questions 3-6: Choose the correct letter A, B, C or D.

choices.text: To describe the economic impact of coffee
To trace the historical origins of coffee
To argue for coffee's health benefits

questions._comment_type: Multiple Select — correct_answer: pipe-separated e.g. A|C|E, max_selections = how many to choose
questions.content: Which THREE of the following are mentioned in the passage?
questions.explanation: Options A, C and E are directly mentioned.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 4-6: Choose THREE letters from A-G.

choices.text: Coffee plants grow only in cold climates
The spread of coffee to Arabia
Coffee was banned in the 18th century
Brazil now produces 90% of the world's coffee

questions._comment_type: Matching Headings — correct_answer is the heading option letter e.g. vi

questions._comment_type: Matching Information — match statement to paragraph letter A-F

questions.explanation: The text states it was cultivated in Ethiopia.
